records.ety: [OE. ouch, nouche (a nouch being taken for an ouch: cf. Adder), fr. OF. nusche, nosche, nousche, buckle, clasp, LL. nusca, fr. OHG. nusca, nuscha.]

defs: A socket or bezel holding a precious stone; hence, a jewel or ornament worn on the person.
quotes: A precious stone in a rich ouche.
